title: About
description: Meet Capri, a Holy Motherhood Mentor and Womb Therapist supporting women through sacred, body-led healing.
heroSubheading: Suniai (ਸੁਣਿਐ) means “to truly listen.” It’s the practice of slowing down, tuning in, and hearing yourself—your body, your needs, your inner voice. Here, healing begins with being deeply heard.
bioParagraphs: Suniai is my heart-centered practice where I serve as a Holy Motherhood Mentor and Womb Therapist. I support women through sacred, body-led healing so they can reconnect to their intuition, restore their nervous system, and move through life from their inner authority.
credentials: Certified Holistic Life Coach — MindBodyFood Institute, 2026
Licensed Massage Therapist — East West College of the Healing Arts, 2017
Sacred Pelvic Healing Massage Training - Portland, OR 2018
Mana Lomi Level 3 Certification — Kona, Hawaii 2024
Usui Reiki Master Teacher Certification — Portland, OR 2014
Ancient Thai Massage Training — Pisac, Peru 2014
Temple of the Rose Initiation — Pisac, Peru 2014

philosophyCards.detail: The body holds wisdom that the thinking mind cannot access. I help you learn to listen.
You are not a problem to be solved, but a whole, complex, beautiful human to be witnessed.
Deep change rarely happens quickly. I create spaciousness for your process to unfold in its own time.
This is a space free from should. What you feel, think, and experience is valid — always.
Insights are only as valuable as their integration into daily life. We build bridges between session and the everyday.
Safety is the foundation of all real growth. We always work with regulated care, not urgency.
